footer.brand: A modern alternative to traditional Minecraft launchers. Designed to be lightweight, fast, and accessible, allowing any user to run the game without compromising performance, even on resource-limited machines.
footer.copyright: © {year} CubicLauncher. Open source under GPLv3. Not affiliated with Mojang AB.

hero.title: CUBIC LAUNCHER.
hero.description: A free, open-source Minecraft launcher focused on performance. Manage multiple instances, mods, and more with radical simplicity.

home.feature1Desc: Create and separate multiple Minecraft instances with different versions, mods, and configurations. All in one place.
home.feature2Desc: CubicLauncher is completely open source. Feel free to audit, modify, and contribute to the project on GitHub.
home.feature3Desc: Log in with multiple Microsoft, Mojang, or launcherCracked accounts in seconds. Manage your profiles securely and switch between them effortlessly.
home.feature4Desc: Designed to use as few resources as possible, allowing your game to run without interruptions or lag.
home.feature5Desc: CubicLauncher offers many options to configure the launcher behavior and Minecraft settings quickly and easily.
home.feature6Desc: Easily manage all your mods, modloaders, texture packs, and logs directly from the launcher interface.
home.mission: CubicLauncher's mission is to provide a free, high-quality solution for players who want to access Minecraft without a premium account. Our focus is on stability, performance, and accessibility, always seeking to improve the user experience without compromising openness and code transparency. CubicLauncher is a modern alternative to traditional Minecraft launchers, designed to be lightweight, fast, and accessible, allowing any user to run the game without compromising performance, even on resource-limited machines.

install.title: Install
install.subtitle: Choose your operating system and download the latest version.
install.lookingForOther: Looking for another version or architecture?

platforms.windowsReq: Windows 10 64-bit or later. 4GB RAM minimum recommended.
platforms.windowsStep2: Run the file. If Windows SmartScreen shows a warning, click 'More info' and then 'Run anyway'.
platforms.windowsStep4: Launch CubicLauncher from the Start menu.
platforms.linuxStep2: Right-click the downloaded file, select 'Properties', go to the 'Permissions' tab, and check 'Allow executing file as program'. Alternatively, run chmod +x cubiclauncher.AppImage in the terminal.
platforms.macosDesc: Universal application for Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) and Intel processors.
platforms.macosStep2: Open the file and drag the CubicLauncher icon to the Applications folder.
platforms.macosStep3: The first time you open it, macOS may prevent it from running. Go to System Settings > Privacy & Security and click 'Open Anyway'.

themes.title: Customize your launcher
themes.description: Explore and download themes created by the community.
themes.author: Author
themes.noResultsHint: Try different search terms or filters
themes.createYourOwn: Want to create your own theme?
themes.themesAvailable: {count, plural, one {# theme available} other {# themes available}}

page.homeDesc: CubicLauncher is an open source, lightweight, and customizable Minecraft launcher.
page.installDesc: Download CubicLauncher, the Minecraft launcher, and enjoy a fast, secure, feature-packed gaming experience.
page.themesDesc: Explore and download community-created themes to customize CubicLauncher.
